summary:
Claim: Mesiolingual and distobuccal pulp horns are at higher risk of exposure during Class II cavity preparation.  
Evidence: - These pulp horns project prominently toward the occlusal surface. - They lie along the path of the initial cutting line in Class II cavities.  
Answer: C
formatted_summary:

Answer: C. Answer choice: C
